query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS queue_exception_requests (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  taskId INT NOT NULL,
  taskCodigo VARCHAR(50),
  fila VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  solicitanteId VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  solicitanteNome VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  justificativa TEXT NOT NULL,
  status VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pendente',
  gestorId VARCHAR(255),
  gestorNome VARCHAR(255),
  gestorResposta TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  respondidoEm TIMESTAMP NULL,
  INDEX idx_qer_task (taskId),
  INDEX idx_qer_solicitante (solicitanteId),
  INDEX idx_qer_status (status)
);
